name: Arena Chimera Spawn

items.name: Bite (Lion Head)
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.

items.name: Headbutt (Goat Head)
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the Spawn moved at least 15 ft. straight toward the target, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

items.name: Fire Spit (Dragon Head, Recharge 6)
items.description: 10-ft. cone. Each creature in the cone must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: Arena Behavior
items.description: These are arena animals fitted with jeweled harnesses. A DC 14 Animal Handling check as an action causes the Spawn to disengage for 1 round. If reduced to 0 HP, the harness activates and the Spawn falls asleep rather than dying.

biography:
Arena Chimera Spawn

Medium monstrosity, unaligned

A smaller, arena-bred chimera with three heads — regal lion, black mountain goat, and brass dragon — fitted with a jeweled harness that glows faintly with enchantment magic. Bred for spectacle rather than slaughter, these creatures are fierce but can be calmed by skilled handlers.

Armor Class 14 (natural armor)

Hit Points 52 (7d10 + 14)

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
16 (+3)11 (+0)14 (+2)3 (−4)14 (+2)6 (−2)

Skills Perception +4

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

Languages —

Challenge 3 (700 XP)

Traits

Arena Behavior. These are arena animals fitted with jeweled harnesses. A DC 14 Animal Handling check as an action causes the Spawn to disengage for 1 round. If reduced to 0 HP, the harness activates and the Spawn falls asleep rather than dying.

Actions

Bite (Lion Head). Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.

Headbutt (Goat Head). Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the Spawn moved at least 15 ft. straight toward the target, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

Fire Spit (Dragon Head, Recharge 6). 10-ft. cone. Each creature in the cone must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Arena Drake

items.name: Pack Tactics
items.description: The drake has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the drake's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

items.name: Multiattack
items.description: The drake makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail swipe.

items.name: Bite
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.

items.name: Tail Swipe
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 ft.

items.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6)
items.description: The drake exhales fire in a 15-ft. cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

biography:
Arena Drake

Large dragon, unaligned

A muscular, wingless drake bred for arena combat, featuring shimmering bronze scales and a decorative leather collar studded with gold. Its powerful tail can send combatants flying. Arena drakes hunt in pairs, using pack tactics to corner their prey.

Armor Class 15 (natural armor)

Hit Points 85 (10d10 + 30)

Speed 40 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
18 (+4)12 (+1)16 (+3)4 (−3)12 (+1)6 (−2)

Saving Throws Str +7, Con +6

Skills Perception +4

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

Languages —

Challenge 5 (1,800 XP)

Traits

Pack Tactics. The drake has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the drake's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

Actions

Multiattack. The drake makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail swipe.

Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.

Tail Swipe. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 ft.

Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6). The drake exhales fire in a 15-ft. cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: Arena Champion Golem

items.name: Immutable Form
items.description: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

items.name: Arena Protocol
items.description: The golem fights honorably. It does not attack unconscious creatures or pursue creatures who leave the arena.

items.name: Multiattack
items.description: The golem makes two greatsword attacks.

items.name: Stone Greatsword
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

items.name: Shockwave (Recharge 5–6)
items.description: Each creature within 15 ft. of the golem must make a DC 16 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 14 (4d6) thunder damage and is knocked prone. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't knocked prone.

biography:
Arena Champion Golem

Large construct, unaligned

A 10-foot-tall construct carved from seamless white marble in the likeness of a champion gladiator, its joints glow with golden magical energy. It wields an enormous stone greatsword and fights with mechanical precision and surprising honor.

Armor Class 17 (natural armor)

Hit Points 114 (12d10 + 48)

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
20 (+5)8 (−1)18 (+4)7 (−2)10 (+0)1 (−5)

Damage Immunities poison, psychic

Condition Immunities charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

Senses darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 10

Languages understands Common but can't speak

Challenge 8 (3,900 XP)

Traits

Immutable Form. The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

Arena Protocol. The golem fights honorably. It does not attack unconscious creatures or pursue creatures who leave the arena.

Actions

Multiattack. The golem makes two greatsword attacks.

Stone Greatsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

Shockwave (Recharge 5–6). Each creature within 15 ft. of the golem must make a DC 16 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 14 (4d6) thunder damage and is knocked prone. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't knocked prone.

name: Golem of the Seventh Star
drCustom: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from Nonmagical Attacks

items.name: Immutable Form
items.description: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

items.name: Arena Protocol
items.description: The golem fights honorably. It does not attack unconscious or fleeing opponents.

items.name: Dramatic Weakness
items.description: At half HP (78 or below), the seven-pointed star on the golem’s chest cracks and glows red. A DC 13 Arcana or Perception check (free action) identifies the weak point. Declared attacks targeting the star deal double damage.

items.name: Multiattack
items.description: The golem makes three attacks: two greatsword strikes and one shield bash.

items.name: Golden Greatsword
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) slashing damage.

items.name: Shield Bash
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 ft. and knocked prone.

items.name: Starfire Beam (Recharge 5–6)
items.description: The golem fires a beam of radiant energy in a 60-ft. line that is 5 ft. wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

items.name: Deflect
items.description: When the golem is hit by a ranged attack, it reduces the damage by 10 (1d10 + 5). If the damage is reduced to 0, the golem catches or deflects the projectile.

biography:
Golem of the Seventh Star

Large construct, unaligned

The ultimate arena champion — a magnificent construct of burnished gold and brass standing twelve feet tall, with a blazing seven-pointed star embedded in its chest. It wields a massive golden greatsword and carries a tower shield. This is the final challenge of the Grand Melee, and it fights with devastating precision.

Armor Class 18 (natural armor)

Hit Points 157 (15d12 + 60)

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
22 (+6)10 (+0)18 (+4)8 (−1)12 (+1)5 (−3)

Saving Throws Str +10, Con +8

Damage Immunities poison, psychic

Damage Resistances Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from Nonmagical Attacks

Condition Immunities charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

Senses darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 11

Languages understands Common but can't speak

Challenge 10 (5,900 XP)

Traits

Immutable Form. The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

Arena Protocol. The golem fights honorably. It does not attack unconscious or fleeing opponents.

Dramatic Weakness. At half HP (78 or below), the seven-pointed star on the golem’s chest cracks and glows red. A DC 13 Arcana or Perception check (free action) identifies the weak point. Declared attacks targeting the star deal double damage.

Actions

Multiattack. The golem makes three attacks: two greatsword strikes and one shield bash.

Golden Greatsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) slashing damage.

Shield Bash. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 ft. and knocked prone.

Starfire Beam (Recharge 5–6). The golem fires a beam of radiant energy in a 60-ft. line that is 5 ft. wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

Reactions

Deflect. When the golem is hit by a ranged attack, it reduces the damage by 10 (1d10 + 5). If the damage is reduced to 0, the golem catches or deflects the projectile.

name: Rift Stalker

items.name: Phase Shift
items.description: At the start of each of its turns, the Rift Stalker becomes partially invisible. Attack rolls against it have disadvantage unless the attacker has truesight or blindsight.

items.name: Pack Tactics
items.description: The Rift Stalker has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the stalker's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

items.name: Temporal Bite
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) force damage.

biography:
Rift Stalker

Medium aberration, unaligned

A sleek, predatory creature that flickers in and out of visibility, its form shifting between dimensions. Rift Stalkers hunt in packs, phasing through reality to ambush their prey. They are drawn to temporal disturbances and emerge from rifts in spacetime.

Armor Class 13

Hit Points 33 (6d8 + 6)

Speed 50 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
14 (+2)16 (+3)12 (+1)3 (−4)12 (+1)6 (−2)

Skills Perception +3, Stealth +5

Damage Resistances force

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 13

Languages —

Challenge 2 (450 XP)

Traits

Phase Shift. At the start of each of its turns, the Rift Stalker becomes partially invisible. Attack rolls against it have disadvantage unless the attacker has truesight or blindsight.

Pack Tactics. The Rift Stalker has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the stalker's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

Actions

Temporal Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) force damage.

name: Temporal Wraith
drCustom: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from Nonmagical Attacks

items.name: Incorporeal Movement
items.description: The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

items.name: Temporal Instability
items.description: When the wraith takes radiant damage, it loses Phase Shift until the start of its next turn.

items.name: Aging Touch
items.description: Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or have its speed reduced by 10 ft. until the end of the target's next turn.

items.name: Time Bolt
items.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) force damage.

items.name: Temporal Wail (Recharge 6)
items.description: Each creature within 30 ft. of the wraith must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of their next turn.

biography:
Temporal Wraith

Medium undead, neutral evil

A spectral figure wreathed in flickering temporal energy, its form constantly shifting between ages — young, old, skeletal, and back again. Temporal Wraiths are creatures born from broken timelines, and their touch ages living creatures rapidly.

Armor Class 14

Hit Points 67 (9d8 + 27)

Speed 0 ft., fly 50 ft. (hover)

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
6 (−2)18 (+4)16 (+3)12 (+1)14 (+2)16 (+3)

Saving Throws Wis +5, Cha +6

Damage Immunities necrotic, poison

Damage Resistances acid, cold, fire, lightning, thunder; Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from Nonmagical Attacks

Condition Immunities charmed, exhaustion, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

Languages —

Challenge 5 (1,800 XP)

Traits

Incorporeal Movement. The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

Temporal Instability. When the wraith takes radiant damage, it loses Phase Shift until the start of its next turn.

Actions

Aging Touch. Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or have its speed reduced by 10 ft. until the end of the target's next turn.

Time Bolt. Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) force damage.

Temporal Wail (Recharge 6). Each creature within 30 ft. of the wraith must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be stunned until the end of their next turn.

name: Riftborn Colossus

items.name: Temporal Flicker
items.description: Ranged attacks have disadvantage against the Colossus. Creatures with truesight or blindsight ignore this effect.

items.name: Rift-Linked
items.description: While the Temporal Rift is open, the Colossus regenerates 10 HP at the start of each of its turns. This regeneration ends if the Rift is sealed.

items.name: Siege Monster
items.description: The Colossus deals double damage to objects and structures.

items.name: Multiattack
items.description: The Colossus makes two Rift Slam attacks.

items.name: Rift Slam
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) force damage.

items.name: Temporal Breath (Recharge 5–6)
items.description: The Colossus exhales a wave of temporal energy in a 30-ft. cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 28 (8d6) force damage and is Slowed (speed halved, −2 AC, −2 Dexterity saves, no reactions) until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage and is not Slowed.

items.name: Rift Spawn (Phase 2 Bonus Action)
items.description: When below half HP (95), the Colossus can use a bonus action to summon 2 Rift Stalkers within 15 ft. of it. The Rift Stalkers act on the Colossus’s initiative. A maximum of 4 summoned Rift Stalkers can be alive at any time.

items.name: Empowered Slam (Phase 2)
items.description: When the Colossus is below half HP, its Rift Slam attacks deal extra 7 (2d6) force damage (total: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning + 14 (4d6) force damage).

biography:
Riftborn Colossus

Huge aberration, chaotic evil

A massive creature of shattered glass, obsidian, and crackling white lightning that has torn its way through a temporal rift. Its body flickers between dimensions, and reality warps around it. The Colossus is the vanguard of something far worse — a harbinger of temporal collapse.

Armor Class 16

Hit Points 189 (18d12 + 72)

Speed 40 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
22 (+6)14 (+2)18 (+4)5 (−3)14 (+2)8 (−1)

Saving Throws Str +10, Con +8, Wis +6

Damage Immunities force, poison

Damage Resistances cold, fire, lightning, thunder

Condition Immunities charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned

Senses truesight 60 ft., passive Perception 12

Languages —

Challenge 12 (8,400 XP)

Traits

Temporal Flicker. Ranged attacks have disadvantage against the Colossus. Creatures with truesight or blindsight ignore this effect.

Rift-Linked. While the Temporal Rift is open, the Colossus regenerates 10 HP at the start of each of its turns. This regeneration ends if the Rift is sealed.

Siege Monster. The Colossus deals double damage to objects and structures.

Empowered Slam (Phase 2). When the Colossus is below half HP, its Rift Slam attacks deal extra 7 (2d6) force damage (total: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning + 14 (4d6) force damage).

Actions

Multiattack. The Colossus makes two Rift Slam attacks.

Rift Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) force damage.

Temporal Breath (Recharge 5–6). The Colossus exhales a wave of temporal energy in a 30-ft. cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 28 (8d6) force damage and is Slowed (speed halved, −2 AC, −2 Dexterity saves, no reactions) until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage and is not Slowed.

Bonus Actions

Rift Spawn (Phase 2). When below half HP (95), the Colossus can use a bonus action to summon 2 Rift Stalkers within 15 ft. of it. The Rift Stalkers act on the Colossus’s initiative. A maximum of 4 summoned Rift Stalkers can be alive at any time.

name: Valerius Thorne — The Philanthropist

items.name: Magic Resistance
items.description: Valerius has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

items.name: Temporal Shield
items.description: When an ally within 30 ft. is hit by an attack, Valerius can use his reaction to grant that ally +5 AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss.

items.name: Chronal Bolt
items.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) force damage.

items.name: Slow (3rd Level)
items.description: 120 ft. range. Up to 6 creatures within a 40-ft. cube must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be affected by the Slow spell (halved speed, −2 AC, −2 Dexterity saves, no reactions, limited actions). Concentration, up to 1 minute.

items.name: Wall of Force (5th Level)
items.description: 120 ft. range. Creates an invisible wall composed of up to 10 panels (each 10 ft. by 10 ft.). The wall is immune to all damage and can’t be dispelled by dispel magic. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

items.name: Counterspell (5th Level)
items.description: 60 ft. range. Automatically interrupts a spell of 5th level or lower being cast. For spells of 6th level or higher, make an Intelligence check (DC 10 + spell level).

items.name: Shield
items.description: +5 AC until the start of Valerius’s next turn, including against the triggering attack. Cast as a reaction when hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile.

items.name: Time Rewind (2/Day)
items.description: As a bonus action, Valerius targets one creature within 30 ft. The target regains 22 (4d8 + 4) hit points as temporal energy reverses recent injuries.

biography:
Valerius Thorne — The Philanthropist

Medium humanoid (human), lawful neutral

A tall, silver-haired man in deep-navy scholar's robes trimmed with subtle gold filigree. Valerius Thorne is Aurelia Solaris’s greatest patron and a temporal mage of extraordinary power. He speaks softly, moves deliberately, and radiates an aura of calm authority. He has secretly been manipulating time to preserve the Golden Hour festival in a perfect loop.

Armor Class 18 (temporal distortion field)

Hit Points 150 (20d8 + 60)

Speed 30 ft., fly 30 ft. (hover)

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
10 (+0)16 (+3)16 (+3)22 (+6)16 (+3)20 (+5)

Saving Throws Int +10, Wis +7, Con +7

Skills Arcana +10, History +10, Insight +7, Persuasion +9

Senses passive Perception 13

Languages Common, Celestial, Draconic, Elvish, Sylvan

Challenge 12 (8,400 XP)

Spellcasting. Intelligence-based spellcaster.

Traits

Magic Resistance. Valerius has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Actions

Chronal Bolt. Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) force damage.

Slow (3rd Level). 120 ft. range. Up to 6 creatures within a 40-ft. cube must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be affected by the Slow spell (halved speed, −2 AC, −2 Dexterity saves, no reactions, limited actions). Concentration, up to 1 minute.

Wall of Force (5th Level). 120 ft. range. Creates an invisible wall composed of up to 10 panels (each 10 ft. by 10 ft.). The wall is immune to all damage. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

Bonus Actions

Time Rewind (2/Day). Valerius targets one creature within 30 ft. The target regains 22 (4d8 + 4) hit points as temporal energy reverses recent injuries.

Reactions

Temporal Shield. When an ally within 30 ft. is hit by an attack, Valerius grants that ally +5 AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss.

Counterspell (5th Level). 60 ft. range. Automatically interrupts a spell of 5th level or lower. For spells of 6th level or higher, make an Intelligence check (DC 10 + spell level).

Shield. +5 AC until the start of Valerius’s next turn, including against the triggering attack.

name: Edric Voss — Human Fighter (Eldritch Knight) 10

items.name: Action Surge (1/Short Rest)
items.description: Edric can take one additional action on top of his regular action and a possible bonus action.

items.name: Second Wind (1/Short Rest)
items.description: As a bonus action, Edric regains 1d10 + 10 hit points.

items.name: War Magic
items.description: When Edric uses his action to cast a cantrip, he can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

items.name: Extra Attack
items.description: Edric can attack twice, instead of once, whenever he takes the Attack action on his turn.

items.name: Indomitable (1/Long Rest)
items.description: Edric can reroll a saving throw that he fails. He must use the new roll.

items.name: Longsword +1
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) slashing damage, or 10 (1d10 + 5) slashing damage if used with two hands.

items.name: Shield (Spell)
items.description: As a reaction when hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, Edric gains +5 AC until the start of his next turn, including against the triggering attack.

items.name: Absorb Elements
items.description: As a reaction when Edric takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, he gains resistance to the triggering damage type until the start of his next turn. The first melee attack he makes on his next turn deals an extra 1d6 damage of the triggering type.

items.name: Thunderwave
items.description: Each creature in a 15-ft. cube originating from Edric must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 thunder damage and is pushed 10 ft. away. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage and isn't pushed.

biography:
Edric Voss — Human Fighter (Eldritch Knight) 10

Medium humanoid (human), lawful neutral

Quiet professional. Oldest of the Silver Chalice. Led a mercenary company before joining. Trusts his team completely. Edric is a broad-shouldered man in his late 40s with a neatly trimmed grey beard and steady hands. He fights with economical precision, wasting no motion.

Armor Class 20 (plate + shield)

Hit Points 94

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
20 (+5)12 (+1)16 (+3)14 (+2)12 (+1)10 (+0)

Saving Throws Str +9, Con +7

Skills Athletics +9, Perception +5, Intimidation +4

Senses passive Perception 15

Languages Common

Traits

War Magic. When Edric uses his action to cast a cantrip, he can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

Extra Attack. Edric can attack twice, instead of once, whenever he takes the Attack action on his turn.

Indomitable (1/Long Rest). Edric can reroll a saving throw that he fails. He must use the new roll.

Actions

Action Surge (1/Short Rest). Edric can take one additional action on top of his regular action and a possible bonus action.

Longsword +1. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) slashing damage, or 10 (1d10 + 5) slashing damage if used with two hands.

Thunderwave. Each creature in a 15-ft. cube originating from Edric must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d8 thunder damage and is pushed 10 ft. away. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage and isn't pushed.

Bonus Actions

Second Wind (1/Short Rest). Edric regains 1d10 + 10 hit points.

Reactions

Shield (Spell). When hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile, Edric gains +5 AC until the start of his next turn, including against the triggering attack.

Absorb Elements. When Edric takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, he gains resistance to the triggering damage type until the start of his next turn. The first melee attack he makes on his next turn deals an extra 1d6 damage of the triggering type.

name: Miriel Ashwood — Half-Elf Cleric (Life Domain) 10

items.name: Disciple of Life
items.description: When Miriel casts a healing spell of 1st level or higher, the target regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

items.name: Preserve Life (Channel Divinity)
items.description: As an action, Miriel presents her holy symbol and evokes healing energy that can restore up to 50 hit points. She chooses any creatures within 30 ft. and divides those hit points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half of its hit point maximum.

items.name: Spirit Guardians (3rd Level)
items.description: Spirits swirl in a 15-ft. radius around Miriel. When a hostile creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Affected creatures have their speed halved. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

items.name: Spiritual Weapon (2nd Level)
items.description: Miriel creates a floating, spectral weapon within 60 ft. Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, one target within 5 ft. of the weapon. Hit: 1d8 + 5 force damage. As a bonus action on subsequent turns, she can move the weapon up to 20 ft. and repeat the attack.

items.name: Mass Healing Word (3rd Level)
items.description: Up to 6 creatures of Miriel's choice within 60 ft. each regain 1d4 + 5 hit points.

items.name: Revivify (3rd Level)
items.description: Miriel touches a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point. This spell can't restore a creature missing body parts. Requires a 300 gp diamond, which the spell consumes.

items.name: Mace
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

biography:
Miriel Ashwood — Half-Elf Cleric (Life Domain) 10

Medium humanoid (half-elf), neutral good

Warm, slightly fussy. Worships Solara. Carries snacks for everyone. Calls the party “my ducklings.” Miriel is a gentle half-elf woman with warm brown eyes and laugh lines. She wears polished chain mail adorned with the sun symbol of Solara and carries a well-worn mace and a shield emblazoned with a golden sunrise.

Armor Class 18 (chain mail + shield)

Hit Points 83

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
14 (+2)10 (+0)16 (+3)10 (+0)20 (+5)14 (+2)

Saving Throws Wis +9, Cha +6

Skills Medicine +9, Insight +9, Persuasion +6

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 15

Languages Common, Elvish, Celestial

Spellcasting. Wisdom-based spellcaster (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks).

Traits

Disciple of Life. When Miriel casts a healing spell of 1st level or higher, the target regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

Actions

Preserve Life (Channel Divinity). Miriel presents her holy symbol and evokes healing energy that can restore up to 50 hit points. She chooses any creatures within 30 ft. and divides those hit points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half of its hit point maximum.

Spirit Guardians (3rd Level). Spirits swirl in a 15-ft. radius around Miriel. When a hostile creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Affected creatures have their speed halved. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

Revivify (3rd Level). Miriel touches a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point. Requires a 300 gp diamond.

Mace. Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

Bonus Actions

Spiritual Weapon (2nd Level). Creates a floating, spectral weapon. Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, Hit: 1d8 + 5 force damage. Bonus action to move and attack on subsequent turns.

Mass Healing Word (3rd Level). Up to 6 creatures within 60 ft. each regain 1d4 + 5 hit points.

name: Renn Quicksilver — Halfling Rogue (Arcane Trickster) 10

items.name: Sneak Attack (5d6)
items.description: Once per turn, Renn deals an extra 5d6 damage to one creature he hits with an attack if he has advantage on the attack roll, or if another enemy of the target is within 5 ft. of it and Renn doesn't have disadvantage.

items.name: Cunning Action
items.description: Renn can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action on each of his turns.

items.name: Mage Hand Legerdemain
items.description: When Renn casts mage hand, the hand is invisible. He can use it to stow or retrieve objects from containers, pick locks, and disarm traps at range. He can perform one of these tasks without being noticed by succeeding on a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check contested by the creature's Wisdom (Perception) check.

items.name: Evasion
items.description: When Renn is subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, he instead takes no damage on a success and only half damage on a failure.

items.name: Uncanny Dodge
items.description: When an attacker Renn can see hits him with an attack, he can use his reaction to halve the attack's damage.

items.name: Shortsword +1
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage.

items.name: Mirror Image
items.description: Three illusory duplicates of Renn appear in his space. Each duplicate has AC 15. When Renn is targeted by an attack, a random determination is made whether the attack targets Renn or one of his duplicates. A duplicate is destroyed if it is hit.

items.name: Find Familiar
items.description: Renn summons an owl familiar. The owl has flyby and can use the Help action to give advantage on Renn's next attack. It can also deliver touch spells and scout ahead.

biography:
Renn Quicksilver — Halfling Rogue (Arcane Trickster) 10

Small humanoid (halfling), chaotic good

Quick-witted, impossible to embarrass. Steals things as a compliment. Best friends with Pip Nimblefingers from the Iron Vanguard. Renn is a wiry halfling with sandy-blond hair, a perpetual grin, and quick hands. He is accompanied by a tiny spectral blue owl familiar. He dresses in dark leather and always seems to have something shiny he wasn't holding a moment ago.

Armor Class 17 (studded leather + DEX)

Hit Points 68

Speed 25 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
8 (−1)20 (+5)12 (+1)16 (+3)10 (+0)14 (+2)

Saving Throws Dex +9, Int +7

Skills Stealth +9, Sleight of Hand +9, Acrobatics +9, Investigation +7, Deception +6, Perception +4

Senses passive Perception 14

Languages Common, Halfling, Thieves' Cant

Spellcasting. Intelligence-based spellcaster (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks).

Traits

Sneak Attack (5d6). Once per turn, Renn deals an extra 5d6 damage to one creature he hits with an attack if he has advantage on the attack roll, or if another enemy of the target is within 5 ft. of it and Renn doesn't have disadvantage.

Mage Hand Legerdemain. When Renn casts mage hand, the hand is invisible. He can use it to stow or retrieve objects, pick locks, and disarm traps at range without being noticed.

Evasion. When subjected to a Dex save for half damage, Renn takes no damage on a success and half on a failure.

Actions

Shortsword +1. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage.

Mirror Image. Three illusory duplicates appear (AC 15). Attacks may target a duplicate instead of Renn.

Find Familiar. Summons an owl familiar for scouting and delivering touch spells.

Bonus Actions

Cunning Action. Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.

Reactions

Uncanny Dodge. When hit by an attack Renn can see, he halves the damage.

name: Lysara Dawnfire — Dragonborn Sorcerer (Draconic Bloodline, Gold) 10

items.name: Metamagic: Twinned Spell
items.description: When Lysara casts a spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have a range of self, she can spend a number of sorcery points equal to the spell's level to target a second creature in range with the same spell (1 sorcery point if the spell is a cantrip).

items.name: Metamagic: Quickened Spell
items.description: When Lysara casts a spell that has a casting time of 1 action, she can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 bonus action for this casting.

items.name: Metamagic: Subtle Spell
items.description: When Lysara casts a spell, she can spend 1 sorcery point to cast it without any somatic or verbal components.

items.name: Sorcery Points (10)
items.description: Lysara has 10 sorcery points, which she regains after a long rest. She can use them to fuel her Metamagic options or convert them to spell slots (and vice versa).

items.name: Draconic Resilience
items.description: Lysara's AC equals 13 + her Dexterity modifier when she isn't wearing armor. Her hit point maximum increases by 1 for each sorcerer level (already included).

items.name: Elemental Affinity (Fire)
items.description: When Lysara casts a spell that deals fire damage, she adds her Charisma modifier (+5) to one damage roll of that spell. She can spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to fire damage for 1 hour.

items.name: Fireball (3rd Level) — “The Dawnfire Special”
items.description: 150 ft. range. Each creature in a 20-ft.-radius sphere must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

items.name: Haste (3rd Level)
items.description: Concentration, up to 1 minute. Touch one willing creature. The target gains +2 AC, has advantage on Dexterity saves, gains an additional action on each of its turns (one weapon attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object), and its speed is doubled. Twinnable with Metamagic.

items.name: Counterspell (3rd Level)
items.description: 60 ft. range. As a reaction, Lysara attempts to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the spell is 3rd level or lower, it fails automatically. For higher-level spells, she makes a Charisma ability check (DC 10 + spell level).

items.name: Fly (3rd Level)
items.description: Touch one willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 ft. for the duration. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

biography:
Lysara Dawnfire — Dragonborn Sorcerer (Draconic Bloodline, Gold) 10

Medium humanoid (dragonborn), chaotic good

Dramatic, vain (in a lovable way), breathtakingly confident. Names her spells. Fireball is “the Dawnfire Special.” Lysara is a golden-scaled dragonborn woman with an imperious bearing and a flair for the dramatic. She speaks with grand gestures and treats every spell cast as a performance.

Armor Class 15 (Draconic Resilience + DEX)

Hit Points 76

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
10 (+0)14 (+2)16 (+3)10 (+0)12 (+1)20 (+5)

Saving Throws Con +7, Cha +9

Skills Arcana +4, Performance +9, Persuasion +9

Senses passive Perception 11

Languages Common, Draconic

Spellcasting. Charisma-based spellcaster (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). Sorcery Points: 10.

Traits

Metamagic: Twinned Spell. Spend sorcery points equal to spell level to target a second creature with a single-target spell.

Metamagic: Quickened Spell. Spend 2 sorcery points to cast a spell as a bonus action instead of an action.

Metamagic: Subtle Spell. Spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without verbal or somatic components.

Sorcery Points (10). 10 sorcery points, recovered on long rest.

Draconic Resilience. AC 13 + DEX when unarmored. HP maximum increases by 1 per sorcerer level.

Elemental Affinity (Fire). Add Charisma modifier (+5) to one fire spell damage roll. Spend 1 sorcery point to gain fire resistance for 1 hour.

Actions

Fireball (3rd Level) — “The Dawnfire Special.” 150 ft. range, 20 ft. radius. DC 17 Dex save, 8d6 fire damage, half on save.

Haste (3rd Level). Concentration. Target gains +2 AC, doubled speed, extra action (one attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, Use Object). Twinnable.

Fly (3rd Level). Touch target gains 60 ft. fly speed for 10 minutes. Concentration.

Reactions

Counterspell (3rd Level). Automatically counter spells 3rd level or lower. Higher: DC 10 + spell level Charisma check.

name: Orin Thistlefoot — Wood Elf Ranger (Gloom Stalker) 10

items.name: Dread Ambusher
items.description: In the first round of combat, Orin gains a +3 bonus to initiative. When he takes the Attack action on the first turn of combat, he can make one additional weapon attack as part of that action, and if that attack hits, the target takes an extra 1d8 damage. His walking speed increases by 10 ft. on his first turn.

items.name: Umbral Sight
items.description: Orin has darkvision out to 90 ft. (60 ft. base + 30 ft. from Gloom Stalker). He is invisible to any creature that relies on darkvision to see him in the darkness.

items.name: Extra Attack
items.description: Orin can attack twice, instead of once, whenever he takes the Attack action on his turn.

items.name: Longbow +1
items.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.

items.name: Shortsword
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage.

items.name: Hunter's Mark (1st Level)
items.description: As a bonus action, Orin marks a creature he can see within 90 ft. Until the spell ends, he deals an extra 1d6 damage to the target whenever he hits it with a weapon attack. Concentration, up to 1 hour.

items.name: Conjure Animals (3rd Level)
items.description: Orin summons fey spirits that take the form of beasts. He can summon 8 beasts of CR 1/4 or lower, or 2 beasts of CR 1 or lower. The beasts are friendly and obey his verbal commands. Concentration, up to 1 hour.

items.name: Silence (2nd Level)
items.description: 120 ft. range. For the duration, no sound can be created within or pass through a 20-ft.-radius sphere centered on a point Orin chooses. Creatures in the sphere are immune to thunder damage, are deafened, and can’t cast spells with verbal components. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

biography:
Orin Thistlefoot — Wood Elf Ranger (Gloom Stalker) 10

Medium humanoid (elf), neutral good

Calm, patient, speaks in short sentences. The moral compass of the group. If Orin says something is wrong, it’s wrong. Orin is a lean, weathered wood elf with dark green eyes and bark-brown skin. He moves silently and speaks even more quietly. His longbow is never far from his hand.

Armor Class 17 (studded leather + DEX)

Hit Points 84

Speed 35 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
12 (+1)20 (+5)14 (+2)10 (+0)16 (+3)8 (−1)

Saving Throws Str +5, Dex +9

Skills Stealth +9, Perception +7, Survival +7, Nature +4

Senses darkvision 90 ft., passive Perception 17

Languages Common, Elvish, Sylvan

Spellcasting. Wisdom-based spellcaster (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks).

Traits

Dread Ambusher. First round of combat: +3 to initiative, one extra attack with first Attack action dealing extra 1d8 damage, walking speed increases by 10 ft.

Umbral Sight. Darkvision 90 ft. Invisible to creatures relying on darkvision to see him.

Extra Attack. Two attacks per Attack action.

Actions

Longbow +1. Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.

Shortsword. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage.

Conjure Animals (3rd Level). Summon 8 CR 1/4 beasts or 2 CR 1 beasts. Concentration, 1 hour.

Silence (2nd Level). 120 ft. range, 20-ft. radius sphere. No sound, immunity to thunder damage, creatures are deafened, verbal spell components impossible. Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

Bonus Actions

Hunter's Mark (1st Level). Mark a creature within 90 ft. Extra 1d6 damage on each hit. Concentration, up to 1 hour.

name: Bron Ironfist

items.name: Dwarven Resilience
items.description: Advantage on saving throws against poison, and resistance to poison damage.

items.name: Improved Critical
items.description: Bron scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

items.name: Second Wind (1/Rest)
items.description: As a bonus action, Bron regains 1d10 + 5 hit points.

items.name: Multiattack
items.description: Bron makes two warhammer attacks.

items.name: Warhammer
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

biography:
Bron Ironfist

Medium humanoid (dwarf), lawful good

Leader of the Iron Vanguard. A stocky dwarf fighter-champion with arms like tree trunks and a brown beard bound with iron rings. Gruff exterior, heart of gold. He and his party are the beloved previous champions of the Heroic Games — secretly frozen in stasis pods beneath Solhaven Palace.

Armor Class 18 (plate)

Hit Points 90 (12d8 + 36)

Speed 25 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
18 (+4)10 (+0)16 (+3)10 (+0)12 (+1)14 (+2)

Saving Throws Str +7, Con +6

Skills Athletics +7, Intimidation +5

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 11

Languages Common, Dwarvish

Challenge 5 (1,800 XP)

Traits

Dwarven Resilience. Advantage on saving throws against poison, and resistance to poison damage.

Improved Critical. Bron scores a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

Actions

Multiattack. Bron makes two warhammer attacks.

Warhammer. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

Second Wind (1/Rest). As a bonus action, Bron regains 1d10 + 5 hit points.

name: Sylara Moonwhisper

items.name: Portent (2/Day)
items.description: After a long rest, Sylara rolls 2d20 and records the numbers. She can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by a creature she can see with one of these foretelling rolls.

items.name: Fey Ancestry
items.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put her to sleep.

items.name: Arcane Recovery (1/Day)
items.description: Once per day during a short rest, Sylara can recover up to 2 levels of expended spell slots.

items.name: Spellcasting (7th Level)
items.description:
Sylara is a 7th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks).

Cantrips (at will): Fire Bolt, Minor Illusion, Prestidigitation

1st level (4 slots): Shield, Mage Armor, Magic Missile

2nd level (3 slots): Misty Step, Detect Thoughts

3rd level (3 slots): Counterspell, Fireball

4th level (1 slot): Greater Invisibility

items.name: Fire Bolt
items.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d10) fire damage.

items.name: Quarterstaff
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d6 − 1) bludgeoning damage.

biography:
Sylara Moonwhisper

Medium humanoid (elf), neutral good

Iron Vanguard’s wizard. A serene elven divination wizard who always seems to know what’s going to happen — except when it mattered most. Tall and willowy with waist-length silver hair, midnight-blue robes with silver star patterns, and pale violet eyes that occasionally flash with prescient light. Found frozen in stasis beneath Solhaven Palace with an expression of stunned surprise — she didn’t see it coming.

Armor Class 13 (16 with Mage Armor)

Hit Points 55 (10d8 + 10)

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
8 (−1)14 (+2)12 (+1)18 (+4)14 (+2)10 (+0)

Saving Throws Int +7, Wis +5

Skills Arcana +7, History +7, Investigation +7

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

Languages Common, Elvish, Draconic, Sylvan

Challenge 4 (1,100 XP)

Traits

Portent (2/Day). After a long rest, Sylara rolls 2d20 and records the numbers. She can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by a creature she can see with one of these foretelling rolls.

Fey Ancestry. Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can’t put her to sleep.

Arcane Recovery (1/Day). Once per day during a short rest, Sylara can recover up to 2 levels of expended spell slots.

Spellcasting (7th Level). Sylara is a 7th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks).

Cantrips (at will): Fire Bolt, Minor Illusion, Prestidigitation

1st level (4 slots): Shield, Mage Armor, Magic Missile

2nd level (3 slots): Misty Step, Detect Thoughts

3rd level (3 slots): Counterspell, Fireball

4th level (1 slot): Greater Invisibility

name: Torq

items.name: Rage (3/Day)
items.description: As a bonus action, Torq enters a rage for 1 minute. While raging: +2 melee damage, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing, advantage on Strength checks and saves. Cannot cast spells.

items.name: Bear Totem
items.description: While raging, Torq has resistance to all damage except psychic.

items.name: Relentless Endurance (1/Day)
items.description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed, Torq drops to 1 HP instead.

items.name: Danger Sense
items.description: Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects Torq can see.

items.name: Reckless Attack
items.description: At the start of his turn, Torq can choose to attack recklessly. He gains advantage on melee attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against him have advantage until his next turn.

items.name: Multiattack
items.description: Torq makes two greataxe attacks.

items.name: Greataxe
items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) slashing damage, plus 2 while raging.

biography:
Torq

Medium humanoid (half-orc), chaotic good

Iron Vanguard’s barbarian. A gentle half-orc poet-barbarian who writes terrible poetry and fights with terrifying efficiency. Broad-shouldered with grey-green skin, swirling tribal tattoos on his neck, and surprisingly kind eyes. Found frozen with an unfinished poem crumpled in his hand. The poem reads: “The axe falls like autumn leaves / But softer, I think, than—”

Armor Class 14 (unarmored defense)

Hit Points 95 (10d12 + 30)

Speed 40 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
18 (+4)14 (+2)16 (+3)8 (−1)12 (+1)10 (+0)

Saving Throws Str +7, Con +6

Skills Athletics +7, Perception +4, Survival +4

Senses passive Perception 14

Languages Common, Orc

Challenge 5 (1,800 XP)

Traits

Rage (3/Day). As a bonus action, Torq enters a rage for 1 minute. While raging: +2 melee damage, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing, advantage on Strength checks and saves. Cannot cast spells.

Bear Totem. While raging, Torq has resistance to all damage except psychic.

Relentless Endurance (1/Day). When reduced to 0 HP but not killed, Torq drops to 1 HP instead.

Danger Sense. Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects Torq can see.

Reckless Attack. At the start of his turn, Torq can choose to attack recklessly. He gains advantage on melee attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against him have advantage until his next turn.

Actions

Multiattack. Torq makes two greataxe attacks.

Greataxe. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) slashing damage, plus 2 while raging.

items.description: On each of her turns, Pip can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

items.name: Naturally Stealthy

items.name: Evasion
items.description: When subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity save for half damage, Pip takes no damage on a success and half on a failure.

biography:
Pip Nimblefingers

Small humanoid (halfling), chaotic good

Iron Vanguard’s rogue. A cheerful halfling who steals everything that isn’t nailed down and picks the pockets of anyone who stands still too long. The youngest member of the Vanguard, with tousled auburn hair and freckles, and an irrepressible grin. Found frozen beneath Solhaven Palace with someone else’s coin purse clutched in her hand.

Armor Class 15 (studded leather)

Hit Points 45 (10d8)

Speed 25 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
8 (−1)18 (+4)10 (+0)14 (+2)12 (+1)16 (+3)

Saving Throws Dex +7, Int +5

Skills Acrobatics +7, Deception +6, Sleight of Hand +7, Stealth +10 (expertise)

Senses passive Perception 11

Languages Common, Halfling, Thieves’ Cant

Challenge 3 (700 XP)

Sneak Attack (3d6). Once per turn, Pip deals an extra 10 (3d6) damage to one creature she hits with an attack if she has advantage on the attack roll, or if an ally is within 5 ft. of the target.

Cunning Action. On each of her turns, Pip can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

Evasion. When subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity save for half damage, Pip takes no damage on a success and half on a failure.

items.name: Aasimar Radiance (1/Day)
items.description: As a bonus action, Elara unleashes divine energy. For 1 minute, she deals an extra 4 radiant damage once per turn when she deals damage.

items.name: War Priest (3/Day)
items.description: When Elara uses the Attack action, she can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

items.name: Spellcasting (9th Level)
items.description:

items.name: Phase 3 — Reluctant Antagonist
items.description: If fought in Phase 3: deals half damage on melee attacks (pulling punches). If a PC is at 0 HP, she uses Healing Word on them instead of attacking. Can be turned mid-fight: Persuasion DC 22 (disadvantage). If turned, she immediately helps destroy the Anchors.

items.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) radiant damage.

biography:
Herald Elara Dawnmantle

Medium humanoid (aasimar), lawful good

The Archduke’s herald and most trusted agent. An aasimar war priest clad in polished silver ceremonial half-plate over a deep blue tabard bearing a golden sunburst crest. She genuinely believes in Valerius’s vision of a world frozen in perfect peace. She has luminous golden skin, white-blonde hair, and eyes that glow with soft divine light. She serves as the party’s guide to Aurelius in Phase 2 and may become a reluctant antagonist in Phase 3. Her character arc is central to the campaign’s moral themes.

Armor Class 18 (plate)

Hit Points 110 (13d8 + 52)

Speed 30 ft.

STRDEXCONINTWISCHA
16 (+3)10 (+0)18 (+4)13 (+1)18 (+4)16 (+3)

Saving Throws Con +8, Wis +8, Cha +7

Skills Insight +8, Medicine +8, Persuasion +7, Religion +5

Senses darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

Languages Common, Celestial

Challenge 9 (5,000 XP)

Traits

Aasimar Radiance (1/Day). As a bonus action, Elara unleashes divine energy. For 1 minute, she deals an extra 4 radiant damage once per turn when she deals damage.

War Priest (3/Day). When Elara uses the Attack action, she can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

Phase 3 — Reluctant Antagonist. If fought in Phase 3: deals half damage on melee attacks (pulling punches). If a PC is at 0 HP, she uses Healing Word on them instead of attacking. Can be turned mid-fight: Persuasion DC 22 (disadvantage). If turned, she immediately helps destroy the Anchors.

Spellcasting (9th Level). Elara is a 9th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks).

Actions

Mace. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) radiant damage.
